response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song 'Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!' by Raora Panthera, which is her first original song. Performed a web search for 'Raora Panthera Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE! Japanese and English lyrics' and successfully retrieved lyrics. The on-screen text '死ぬまでピュアピュアやってのん？' is a line from this song.
response.global_summary: This video features the 3D debut of VTuber Raora Panthera, including a tour of 'Chattini Land' and ending with a performance of her original song.

scenes.description: Raora Panthera explores 'Chattini Land' and interacts with the mascot character Chattino, with upbeat background music and no featured vocal music.
Raora Panthera performs her original song 'Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!' with the lyrics '死ぬまでピュアピュアやってのん？' displayed on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
さあ、さあ、お宝探しだ
「今日は、ど～んな獲物が見つかるかにゃ？」
ほら、ほら、みんなも一緒に
「楽しい冒険、しゅっぱ～つ！」
(Un！ Due！ Tre！)
ハマっちゃったら抜け出せないの～
食べ物ぬいぐるみ Pizza も Pasta も全部
詰め込んだ魅惑の迷宮
ワクワク止まらない (Proviamo！)
取れそうで取れなくてイライラ
クレーンゲーム
死ぬまでピュアピュアやってのん？
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Come on, come on, time for a treasure hunt
"What kind of prey will we find today?"
Come on, come on, everyone together
"A fun adventure, let's go!"
(One! Two! Three!)
Once you're hooked, you can't get out
Food, stuffed animals, pizza, and pasta, all of it
Packed into an enchanting labyrinth
The excitement never stops (Let's try!)
It looks like you can grab it, but you can't, so frustrating
Crane game
Are you going to do pure, pure things until you die?
